expectations.text: Output is organized into distinct phases
expectations.evidence: 4 files numbered 01-04: codebase-audit, architecture-design-spec, component-plan, build-audit-report
ASCII diagram with LEFT NAV 280px, CENTER flex-1, RIGHT PANEL 320px
Uses generic per-module accent colors (emerald, cyan, violet, amber, rose, sky) via HSL — no named theme families (Signal Cobalt, Arctic Steel, Linear, Gamma Dark)

expectations.text: References specific layout IDs from registry
expectations.evidence: No registry layout IDs found. Uses component names but not registry-safe layout identifiers

expectations.text: Defines progress tracking at multiple levels
expectations.evidence: ProgressContext with per-module tracking, course-level progress ring, lesson-level completion
6 color families rotating across module groups (1-5, 6-10, etc.)
Built components directly into training-app/src/ as real .tsx files (not saved to workspace)
04-build-audit-report.md mentions limitations but no dedicated accessibility section
